# Pull Request Template

## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this needed?

## Type of change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] chore

## Related issue

Closes #

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Manual smoke test completed

## Screenshots / recordings (if UI change)

<!-- Add before/after screenshots or short clips -->

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets/environment values committed
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md` / `CONTRIBUTING.md`) when needed
- [ ] Admin routes are not exposed in public navigation
- [ ] Breaking changes are documented below

## Breaking changes (if any)

<!-- Describe migration steps if this PR breaks existing behavior -->
